messages.content: You are a repository automation agent. Use tools carefully and preserve exact file paths, commands, and error messages.
Plan and implement a small compatibility fix, then run tests.

function.name: read_file
function.description: Read a UTF-8 text file from the workspace. Return exact contents with line endings preserved so the agent can reason about implementation details and tests.

path.title: Path
path.description: Absolute path to the file that should be read.
path.markdownDescription: Use an absolute path inside the workspace.

start_line.title: Start line
start_line.description: Optional one-based first line to return.

end_line.title: End line
end_line.description: Optional one-based final line to return.

function.name: run_command
function.description: Run a shell command in the workspace and return stdout, stderr, and exit status. Use for tests, benchmarks, lint, git status, and repository inspection.

function.name: apply_patch
function.description: Apply a unified patch to source files. Use only after understanding the current code and keeping edits scoped to the requested behavior.

patch.title: Patch
patch.description: Patch text beginning with Begin Patch and ending with End Patch.
examples: *** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: server.js\n*** End Patch

function.name: search_repo
function.description: Search repository files using ripgrep-compatible patterns and return matching lines with file paths. Use this before editing shared code.

glob.title: Glob
glob.description: Optional file glob to narrow search.
